zh.lifeSummary: 當Rose de Montfort於大約1308年出生在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓時，她的父親William de Montfort33歲，母親Agneta Holt29歲。她於1326年與Nicholas Durvassal在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1362年在她的家鄉享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rose de Montfort于大约1308年出生在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓时，她的父亲William de Montfort33岁，母亲Agneta Holt29岁。她于1326年与Nicholas Durvassal在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1362年在她的家乡享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Rose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ostensibly from the vocabulary word denoting the flower (Latin rosa). However, the name was in use throughout the Middle Ages, long before any of the other girls' names derived from flowers, which are generally of 19th-century origin. In part it may refer to the flower as a symbol of the Virgin Mary, but it seems more likely that it also has a Germanic origin, probably as a short form of various girls' names based on hros ‘horse’ or hrōd ‘fame’. The Latinate form Rohesia is commonly found in documents of the Middle Ages. As well as being a name in its own right, it is currently used as a short form of Rosemary and, less often (because of their different pronunciation), of other names beginning Ros-, such as Rosalind and Rosamund .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Rose de Montfort was born about 1308, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, her father, William de Montfort, was 33 and her mother, Agneta Holt, was 29. She married Nicholas Durvassal in 1326, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died in 1362, in her hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rose de Montfort est née environ 1308, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Montfort, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Agneta Holt, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Durvassal en 1326, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1362, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rose de Montfort um 1308 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Montfort 33 und ihre Mutter Agneta Holt 29. Sie hat 1326 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Nicholas Durvassal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1362 im Alter von 55 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rose de Montfort è nata il circa 1308 nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, William de Montfort, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Agneta Holt, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Durvassal nel 1326, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1362, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rose de Montfortが約1308年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで生まれた時，父William de Montfortは33歳，母Agneta Holtは29歳であった。1326年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでNicholas Durvassalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1362年に故郷で55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rose de Montfort(이)가 대략 1308년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Montfort(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agneta Holt(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1326년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Nicholas Durvassal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1362년 그녀의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rose de Montfort nasceu aproximadamente 1308, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Montfort, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Agneta Holt, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Durvassal em 1326, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1362, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rose de Montfort родилась около 1308 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Montfort было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Agneta Holt, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Durvassal в 1326 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1362 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rose de Montfort nació aproximadamente 1308, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Montfort, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Agneta Holt, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Nicholas Durvassal en 1326, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1362, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años.
